# BRIEF

## User-Facing Goal

Get the backend running in production so the app can be tested end to end.

## Success Criteria

- Railway can build and start the backend service.
- The repo contains a clear backend deployment entrypoint.
- The setup aligns with the current `backend/` workspace structure.

## UX Notes

- None; deployment infrastructure task.

## Risks Or Tradeoffs

- Without the exact Railway error log, the first fix should target the most common .NET Railway startup issues.
